text: heads up — payment gateway URL changed. We migrated to the v2 endpoint. New URL is https://payments.internal/v2/charge. Will update the secrets but someone needs to update deployment.yaml too before the next deploy
Got it Priya. I'll add it to the v2.1 deploy checklist
v2.1 deploy checklist complete. Reviewed DB migrations, env vars (checked secrets manager), load test passed. Going out tonight.
v2.1 deployed to production. api: 3 replicas healthy. frontend: 2 replicas healthy.

btw I just realized deployment.yaml still has the old payment gateway URL. The secrets got updated but not the config file. Someone should fix that — if a pod restarts and picks up the config file value instead of the secret it'll break
Adding it to the backlog, will fix in v2.1.1

Reminder: we had a payment gateway URL issue on March 3rd. Same root cause — stale URL in config. If this fires again, rollback is fastest, but remember to also update the config before the next deploy forward.
Seeing some elevated memory on api service — around 480MB. Still within limits but worth watching. Load gen has been running at 2x normal for the perf test.
Team — I'm in planning sessions all morning (9am-12pm). Marcus is best point of contact for anything payments-related until afternoon.
On it. I'm free all morning.
